title: Brigade Defense Against a Peer Threat Armored Assault
description: A peer mechanized brigade is massing for an armored assault along a narrow corridor. Friendly brigade must establish a defense in depth, channel enemy forces into engagement areas, and retain the initiative through counterattack.

enemy_force.name: 3rd Enemy Mechanized Brigade
enemy_force.disposition: Massed in assembly areas 15km east, prepared to attack along axis RED
enemy_force.most_likely_coa: Combined arms breach along main avenue with follow-on exploitation.
enemy_force.most_dangerous_coa: Massed rocket artillery suppression followed by armored penetration.

terrain.name: Main Battle Area
terrain.description: Rolling open terrain with limited defilade.

terrain.name: River Obstacle Belt
terrain.description: Natural obstacle with limited crossing sites.

civil_considerations: Civilian population evacuated from forward villages
restrictions: No fires east of phase line GREEN without corps approval
higher_intent: Defeat the enemy brigade forward of phase line GREEN and retain key terrain.
